allow: PowerShell($mavenVersion = "3.9.9"; $url = "https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/$mavenVersion/binaries/apache-maven-$mavenVersion-bin.zip"; Write-Output "Trying: $url"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\maven.zip" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Downloaded OK" } catch { Write-Output "Failed: $_"; $url2 = "https://dlcdn.apache.org/maven/maven-3/$mavenVersion/binaries/apache-maven-$mavenVersion-bin.zip"; Write-Output "Trying mirror: $url2"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url2 -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\maven.zip" -UseBasicParsing }; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\maven.zip"\) { Expand-Archive -Path "$env:TEMP\\maven.zip" -DestinationPath "D:\\tools" -Force; Rename-Item "D:\\tools\\apache-maven-$mavenVersion" "maven" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Maven installed to D:\\tools\\maven" })

PowerShell($url = "https://dlcdn.apache.org/maven/maven-3/3.9.9/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.9-bin.zip"; Write-Output "Downloading from: $url"; try { $ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\maven.zip" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output "OK - Size: $\(\(Get-Item $env:TEMP\\maven.zip\).Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://dlcdn.apache.org/maven/maven-3/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $versions = [regex]::Matches\($resp.Content, '\(\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\)/'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Sort-Object -Descending | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Output "Available Maven versions:"; $versions } catch { Write-Output "Cannot list versions: $_" })
PowerShell(cd D:\\Job\\backend; Get-ChildItem mvnw.cmd, mvnw, .mvn -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.FullName\) \($\($_.Length\) bytes\)" })

PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2" -Force | Out-Null; Write-Output ".m2 directory created" } else { Write-Output ".m2 exists"; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\settings.xml" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell([System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('SASS_BINARY_SITE', 'https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node-sass', 'User'\); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('ELECTRON_MIRROR', 'https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/', 'User'\); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR', 'https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/', 'User'\); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('PUPPETEER_DOWNLOAD_HOST', 'https://npmmirror.com/mirrors', 'User'\); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('CHROMEDRIVER_CDNURL', 'https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/chromedriver', 'User'\); Write-Output "Binary mirror env vars set for: node-sass, electron, puppeteer, chromedriver")

PowerShell(python D:\\Job\\.claude\\scripts\\log-change.py Write D:\\Job\\test.txt D:\\Job 2>&1; python D:\\Job\\.claude\\scripts\\session-summary.py D:\\Job 2>&1; Write-Output "Worklog scripts tested OK"; Get-Content D:\\Job\\docs\\worklog\\2026-07-10.md -Tail 5)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\); & python -m pip config set global.index-url https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/ 2>&1; & python -m pip config set global.trusted-host mirrors.aliyun.com 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; & python -m pip config list 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; & python -m pip install --upgrade pip -q 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:2000]\)")
